code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut has = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        mut val = cur
        if neg
          val = 0 - val
        end
        val = val * 2
        if first
          out = "#{val}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{val}"
        end
        has = false
        cur = 0
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    mut val = cur
    if neg
      val = 0 - val
    end
    val = val * 2
    if first
      out = "#{val}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{val}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
